name: Kidney CT With Contrast
description: Contrast-enhanced CT of the kidneys for evaluation of renal masses, stones, and collecting system pathology

findings.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen was performed with corticomedullary and excretory phase imaging.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Right Kidney
sections.content: The right kidney measures approximately [X cm] in longitudinal dimension and demonstrates [normal cortical attenuation / no mass / no lesion]. No renal vein thrombosis.

sections.name: Left Kidney
sections.content: The left kidney measures approximately [X cm] in longitudinal dimension and demonstrates [normal cortical attenuation / no mass / no lesion]. No renal vein thrombosis.

sections.name: Collecting System
sections.content: The bilateral renal collecting systems are [not dilated / no hydronephrosis]. No filling defect or urothelial thickening.

sections.name: Ureters
sections.content: The bilateral ureters are [patent / no obstruction / no dilation]. No obstructing stone or stricture.

sections.name: Renal Vasculature
sections.content: The bilateral renal arteries are [patent / no stenosis / no aneurysm]. The renal veins are [patent / no thrombosis].

sections.name: Perirenal Space
sections.content: The perirenal fat is [unremarkable / no stranding / no hemorrhage]. No perirenal mass or collection.

sections.name: Bladder
sections.content: The bladder is [not distended / no wall thickening / no mass]. No filling defect.

sections.name: Adrenal Glands
sections.content: The bilateral adrenal glands are [normal / no mass / no hyperplasia].

sections.name: Liver and Spleen
sections.content: The liver and spleen are [unremarkable / no mass / no lesion].

impression:
1. Normal contrast-enhanced CT kidneys.
2. No renal mass, stone, or collecting system abnormality identified.
author: RadReport Templates
